description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs with the default image and includes a before_script that creates a symlink `ln -s $PWD data/xonotic-data.pk3dir`, sets `MAKEFLAGS=-j$(nproc)` and echoes it, sets `CC="gcc -pipe"`, attempts to download `gmqcc` from https://beta.xonotic.org/pipeline-bin/gmqcc and, if successful, exports `QCC="$PWD/gmqcc"` and makes it executable, otherwise clones the gmqcc repo, builds it with `make -C gmqcc`, and exports `QCC="$PWD/gmqcc/gmqcc"`, then sets `QCCFLAGS_WATERMARK=gitlab_pipeline` and `ZIP=/bin/true`. Define a single stage `test` with two jobs. The `test_compilation_units` job runs only when files under `qcsrc/**/*` change and executes `make test-diff` (failing with colored messages if changes are detected) followed by `make test-comp`. The `test_sv_game` job runs on every pipeline and executes `export EXPECT=5c34854fb0d99f06ffa76929f5008f1f`, `qcsrc/tools/sv_game-hashtest.sh` and exits with its status. Add a workflow that skips the pipeline when the commit message matches `/Transifex autosync/` and otherwise runs.
